verification_policy: Human verification recommended for any low/very-low-resource output before client delivery.

recommended_resources.name: Kreyòl-MT
recommended_resources.license: Model fine-tuned from mBART-50; dataset licence: 'other' (see card)
recommended_resources.offline: Many-to-many mBART-50 fine-tune; dataset = largest public Creole MT corpus (11.6M public sentences).
recommended_resources.notes: Strongest dedicated Haitian Creole option (purpose-built for creoles).

recommended_resources.name: NLLB-200 (distilled 600M)
recommended_resources.offline: Convert to CTranslate2 / quantize (int8) for low-RAM phones.

recommended_resources.name: MADLAD-400-3B-MT
recommended_resources.offline: GGUF 2–4-bit quantization brings the 3B model under ~1–2 GB.
recommended_resources.notes: Permissive licence (commercial OK). Prefix input with <2xx> target token.

speech_to_text.note: Not in SeamlessM4T v2. Haitian Creole is lexically close to French; a French ASR can give a rough first pass, but verify with a fluent speaker. SeamlessM4T v2 does NOT list this language. Use the text pipeline with human transcription of voice notes, or a community ASR model verified before use.

integration_notes: Lexically close to French; French pivot works well as a fallback.
